title: The Country Is Forced Into a Hunt
description: Pages 16–17 focus on the country is forced into a hunt, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo announces the rules of his Birdcage game, putting prices on the heads of Luffy, Law, Riku, and the allies who threaten him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We can think about that stuff later!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Take a good look at this country!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You think I can just stop now?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you spot a target, tell everyone else at once!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We can't capture Doflamingo, and so...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We must keep the BERSERK citizens under control!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Our target is the pirate alliance of straw hat and law!! Send word to all units!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wait!! I need you to remove my restrants first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, they'll come off sooner or later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're not going to jump down?!

summary: The Country Is Forced Into a Hunt develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
